flowContents.comments: Load files from S3 bucket into a MySQL database.

labels.label: Routing the flowfiles for avro format conversion

We need to use FetchS3Object because files listed by ListS3 processor will have 
only attributes, not content.
So this processor downloads/fetches the content of file and 
place inside it.

This processor fetches the file that are present inside the specified bucket (source bucket).
Inside properties we need to define :
-> bucket name 
-> AWS Credentials provider Service
-> Endpoint URL
Placing records in MySQL database table.

flowContents.name: S3_To_MySQL
